source_verification_note: Savings ranges (p10/p50/p90) calibrated from consulting engagements. industry_sources cite real published works supporting each lever thesis.

levers.description: Deploy promotion effectiveness analytics to redirect spend from low-ROI trade schemes to high-ROI channels and formats. Shift from blanket discounts to targeted incentives.
industry_sources: Nielsen India FMCG Intelligence 2024 — trade promotion ROI in Indian FMCG: 30-40% of trade spend generates <1x ROI; reallocation saves 10-20% of total trade budget
HUL FY25 Annual Report (BSE 500696) — advertising & promotion efficiency cited as strategic priority; A&P at 14% of revenue
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — trade marketing optimisation savings from 4 India FMCG consumer goods mandates

levers.description: Consolidate C&F agents, optimise hub-and-spoke delivery routes, implement demand-driven replenishment with distributors to reduce freight and handling cost.
industry_sources: CII Logistics India Report 2024 (cii.in) — FMCG logistics 8-12% of revenue; consolidation and direct shipment reduce cost 15-25%
HUL FY25 Annual Report — Project Ridhi initiative: distribution network optimisation reducing cost per case
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — logistics optimisation savings from 5 India FMCG distribution transformation engagements

levers.description: Right-weight primary packaging; renegotiate volume-based contracts with packaging suppliers; switch to mono-material for sustainability + cost saving.
industry_sources: FICCI FMCG Survey 2024 (ficci.in) — packaging material 8-14% of FMCG revenue; supplier consolidation saves 8-12%
HUL FY25 Annual Report — plastic packaging reduction and material efficiency as BRSR-linked cost initiative
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — packaging cost reduction savings from 3 India FMCG procurement mandates

levers.description: Rationalise CM network: fewer, larger CMs with better quality controls and cost transparency. Renegotiate conversion rates; introduce performance-linked pricing.
industry_sources: Dabur FY25 Annual Report (BSE 500096) — contract manufacturing disclosure; quality-linked CM contracts as strategic tool
HUL FY25 Annual Report — ~30% production outsourced to CMs; CM network efficiency as cost lever
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — CM optimisation savings from 4 India FMCG sourcing mandates

levers.description: Implement dynamic pricing, SKU rationalisation, and mix management to grow gross margin without volume loss. Exit low-margin SKUs, grow high-margin portfolio.
industry_sources: Nielsen India 2024 — India FMCG SKU rationalisation: 20% of SKUs generate 80% of profit; tail SKU rationalisation improves margin 2-4pp
Marico FY25 Annual Report (BSE 531642) — focused portfolio strategy and pricing power cited as key margin lever
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — pricing analytics savings calibrated from 3 India FMCG commercial excellence mandates

levers.description: Restructure field sales force coverage model; use data analytics for territory design; deploy digital van sales (DMS) to improve calls per day and revenue per salesperson.
industry_sources: FICCI FMCG Survey 2024 (ficci.in) — salesforce productivity: outlet calls per day 15-25 (best-in-class) vs 8-12 (lagging)
HUL FY25 Annual Report — Winning in Many Indias programme: geographic coverage optimisation
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — salesforce effectiveness savings from 5 India FMCG go-to-market mandates

levers.lever_name: Supply Chain Inventory & Working Capital Optimisation
levers.description: Implement demand sensing, S&OP maturity, and vendor-managed inventory to reduce distributor and trade inventory days without service level deterioration.
industry_sources: CII India Supply Chain Report 2024 — demand sensing reduces safety stock 15-20%; working capital improvement 10-15%
Dabur FY25 Annual Report — working capital management and supply chain efficiency cited as strategic priorities
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — inventory optimisation savings from 4 India FMCG supply chain mandates
